name: Vernon Wells
transactions: June 3, 1997:Drafted by theToronto Blue Jaysin the1st round(5th pick) of the 1997 amateur draft. Player signed June 3, 1997.
January 21, 2011:Traded by theToronto Blue Jaysto theLos Angeles Angels of AnaheimforMike NapoliandJuan Rivera.
March 26, 2013:Traded by theLos Angeles Angels of Anaheimto theNew York YankeesforExicardo Cayones(minors) andKramer Sneed(minors).
